case_title: WYKOWSKI, HENRY G. vs. ROJKO, CATHERINE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WYKOWSKI, HENRY G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROJKO, CATHERINE $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,250.00 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, $4,500.00 GENERAL DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,380.00
